letters.author: Ameera
letters.title: Morning Drizzle in Nashik
letters.content: Good morning Harit! Testing cloud sync.

letters.author: Harit
letters.title: Quiet Rain in Gujarat & Thoughts of Ameera
letters.content:
Good morning my dearest Ameera ☀️

It is 1:45 AM here in Ahmedabad, Gujarat. A gentle monsoon drizzle is tapping against my window near the Sabarmati Riverfront, and the cool night breeze feels so peaceful.

I cooked Kathiyawadi Sev Tameta and toasted warm Parathas tonight—remember that cute food stall near Marine Drive where we sat together? It wasn't quite as delicious without you teasing me about adding extra chilies!

I hope you wake up in Mumbai, Maharashtra feeling rested and smiling as you read this. Don't rush your morning chai today; take a deep breath and know that even across 520 kilometers, you are the very first thought on my mind every morning and the last every night.

Forever yours,
Harit 💛

replies.text: This made me smile over my morning chai in Mumbai! I miss you so much Harit! Counting down the days until our Vande Bharat trip next month 🚆

letters.author: Ameera
letters.title: Mumbai Sunset at Bandra Stand & Arabian Sea Breeze
letters.content:
Dearest Harit,

The sun just set over the Arabian Sea in Mumbai, painting the Maharashtra sky in vivid rose and warm amber. I walked along Bandra promenade after work and watched the monsoon waves crash against the shore.

I kept thinking about how much you love the sea breeze here. I bought a small hand-carved wooden elephant today that reminded me of our trip to Gir Sanctuary in Gujarat!

Sleep tight, my love. I will be dreaming of us walking along Atal Bridge at Kankaria Lake together soon.

All my love,
Ameera ✨

dinners.foodName: Virtual Paneer Butter Masala & FaceTime Candlelight
dinners.funnyMoment: Harit set off the kitchen smoke alarm in Gujarat while roasting Naan, and Ameera laughed so hard in Maharashtra!

dinners.foodName: Swiggy Misal Pav & Gujju Dhokla Platter
dinners.funnyMoment: We debated spicy Maharashtra Misal vs sweet Gujarati Kadhi for 45 minutes straight on video call.

gratitudes.author: Ameera
gratitudes.text: Thank you for waiting to eat dinner with me over FaceTime even when you had a long day in Gujarat.

gratitudes.author: Harit
gratitudes.text: You sent me the sweetest voice note when you knew I was stressed about work.

memories.title: Marine Drive Sunset Walk
memories.description: Watching the Queen's Necklace lights light up the Mumbai coastline as the sun dipped into the Arabian Sea.

wishes.title: Take Vande Bharat express together from Ahmedabad to Mumbai 🚆

surprises.title: For your busy afternoon in Mumbai 🎁
surprises.content: I recorded an acoustic guitar cover of 'Tum Se Hi' for you!

timeCapsules.author: Harit
timeCapsules.title: Open After Our 200th Shared Dinner 🍷
timeCapsules.letterContent: If you're reading this, we have shared two hundred meals across Gujarat & Maharashtra! I wrote this on Dinner #50 when I realized I never want to eat dinner without you.

bookQuotes.author: Chitra Banerjee Divakaruni
bookQuotes.quote: Love comes like a summer wind, unbidden and overwhelming.
bookQuotes.personalNote: Thought of you while reading this chapter tonight in Gujarat.
